_comment: 1. DenyInsecureTransport — block any S3 call not over TLS
2. DenyUnencryptedUploads — block any PutObject that doesn't use KMS encryption
We do NOT add an explicit DenyDelete in the bucket policy because:
(a) The snapshot IAM role's permissions policy already omits s3:Delete*
(b) An explicit Principal:* Deny on Delete would interfere with the bucket
lifecycle policy's expiration action, which is the canonical aging-out
path per founder lock §3 (hot 14d → IA 30d → Glacier 18mo → expire).
